content.speakerText: I need my dress for a wedding on Saturday. When can I collect it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我周六有个婚礼，需要这件礼服，什么时候能取？
expectedAnswers: Could you have it ready by Thursday? I want to try it on before the wedding.
Is Friday okay? I need time to steam it before the big day.
What’s the earliest possible day? I’m really hoping to get it before Saturday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达需求并请求具体取衣时间
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'have it ready by', 'could you', 'earliest possible' 等结构
表达自然度：是否使用符合英语口语习惯的表达，避免生硬直译
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'wedding', 'collect', 'ready', 'earliest' 等场景关键词
